# Rashidtvmr's Blog
> Personal blog and portfolio of Mohammed Rashid (rashidtvmr) — Senior Frontend Engineer specializing in React, TypeScript, web performance, and modern frontend architecture.

## About
- Site: https://raashid.qzz.io
- Author: Mohammed Rashid (rashidtvmr)
- Location: Chennai, India
- Expertise: React, TypeScript, JavaScript, Frontend Engineering, Web Performance, Framer Motion, Next.js

## Core Pages
- Home: https://raashid.qzz.io/

- Resume: https://raashid.qzz.io/posts/resume
- RSS Feed: https://raashid.qzz.io/rss.xml
